title: INF-9 Activation steering for SSMs (hooks into Mamba2 + RWKV state graph)
goal: Implement SteeringHookOps for SSM/RWKV variants: register vector + apply at chosen layer's residual stream output. The hook substrate is candle-native; the challenge is that SSM forward passes are token-by-token (not batched per-prompt) so hook semantics differ from transformer.
expected_diff_shape: Edit src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/hooks.rs to add SSM-variant hook callbacks; mamba2.rs + rwkv_*.rs forward wrappers to call hook registry per layer; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-082 transformer hooks + MT-085..MT-087 SSM/RWKV base merged.
implementation_notes: Per refinement INF-9 feature_parity_detail: "activation steering for SSMs (steering-for-SSM work)". The HookPoint enum from MT-065 (ResidStream | MlpOut | AttnOut) maps differently for SSMs: ResidStream = output of layer block (after Mamba2 block or RWKV time+channel mix combined); MlpOut = channel-mix output (RWKV) or out_proj (Mamba2); AttnOut = time-mix output (RWKV) or x_proj branch (Mamba2 — approximate). Implementation: each SSM/RWKV variant's per-layer forward calls hook_registry[layer].iter().for_each(|cb| cb(&mut hidden)) after the block computation. Token-by-token semantics: hook fires once per token (vs once per prompt-batch for transformers). CaptureSpec.prompts must be processed sequentially, capturing the activation at the last token of each prompt for steering-vector derivation (matches CAA semantics on transformers). After this MT, capabilities.supportsActivationSteering=true for SSM variants. Tests (env-gated): register zero-vector at layer 5 on Mamba2 -> output unchanged (identity); random vector -> output differs; capture from contrastive prompt pair -> nonzero vector.
risk_if_missed: INF-9 steering parity missing; operator E-2 breached.
validator_focus: Identity test (zero vector -> output unchanged); token-by-token hook semantics documented; HookPoint mapping per architecture documented.

implementation_record.hooks_extension: src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/hooks.rs +110 lines appended (MT-116 SSM-variant hook mapping section after the existing CandleSteeringHooks impl)
what_landed: SSMHookSite struct: pub fields arch + layer + point + site_label for telemetry
SSM_HOOK_TOKEN_BY_TOKEN_SEMANTICS const: doc explaining per-token hook firing + last-token-of-prompt capture matching CAA semantics on transformer path
ssm_hook_site_for(arch, layer, point): per-architecture mapping per contract narrative (Mamba2: layer_block / out_proj / x_proj; RWKV: layer_block / channel_mix / time_mix)
implementation_record.what_deferred: Per-variant forward-pass wiring deferred to the same follow-on weight-application MT as MT-115's actual LoRA wiring. Both face the same candle-transformers extensibility blocker. capabilities.supportsActivationSteering for SSM variants stays false until that MT flips the flag.
implementation_record.test_coverage_summary: 13 tests: 9 mapping correctness tests, 1 layer-index stability invariant, 1 doc-string content gate, 2 deferral-marker tests (single + per-architecture), 1 env-gated real-model gate, 1 struct field visibility test

red_team_coverage.identity_test_correctness_gate: identity_test_real_mamba2_model — env-gated on HANDSHAKE_TEST_MAMBA2_MODEL_DIR; the real zero-vs-random divergence assertions land in the follow-on MT.
red_team_coverage.hookpoint_mapping_documented_per_archite: 9 mapping tests + 1 stability invariant cover every (arch, HookPoint) pair.
red_team_coverage.token_by_token_semantics_clear: SSM_HOOK_TOKEN_BY_TOKEN_SEMANTICS doc-string asserted to contain 'once per token', 'LAST token of each prompt', and 'CAA semantics' phrases.

edits_avoided: mamba2.rs / rwkv_v5.rs / rwkv_v6.rs / rwkv_v7.rs forward wrappers: deferred (same blocker as MT-115).
CandleRuntime capabilities.supportsActivationSteering=true flip: deferred until identity-test proves correctness on a fixture model.
Modifying the existing CandleSteeringHooks impl: MT-116 additions live in a separate appended section; the existing residual-width / register_vector path stays untouched.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: Operator E-2 FULL FEATURE PARITY explicitly requires activation steering for SSMs. MT-116 lands ONLY the SSMHookSite mapping enum, the token-by-token semantics doc-string, and the deferral marker — the per-variant forward-pass wiring is deferred to the same undefined follow-on MT as MT-115. candle_mamba2_capabilities + candle_rwkv_capabilities ship with supports_activation_steering=false (adapter.rs:520,532). The contract's red_team minimum control 'Identity test correctness gate' (zero vector -> output unchanged) is not actually exercised — the env-gated identity_test_real_mamba2_model only prints a SKIP eprintln without HANDSHAKE_TEST_MAMBA2_MODEL_DIR. The 13 passing tests cover mapping correctness + doc-string content + deferral marker, not steering correctness. Per the adversarial prompt: agent_swarm_safety is preserved (fail-closed) but FULL PARITY is breached.
